name: SCP Foundation (SCP's Pov)
description:
SCP Unverse created by the "/x/" forum of 4chan in June 2007. It started with a single file, SCP-173, created by an anonymous user later identified as "Moto42". The SCP Foundation is now a large collaborative wiki project on Wikidot.

Characters: SCP-173, SCP-049, SCP-939, SCP-096, SCP-682, SCP-106, SCP-087, SCP-3008, SCP-914, SCP-811, SCP-093, SCP-999, SCP-035, SCP-343, SCP-610, SCP-2317, SCP-131, SCP-066, SCP-500, SCP-079, SCP-166, SCP-3999, SCP-1730, SCP-294, SCP-1471, SCP-001G (Gate Guardian), SCP-001S (Scarlet King), and Dr. Vesa Kallis (Female Scientist OC)

Plot: The containment cell is a clinical cube of reinforced polymer, its walls studded with pale containment emitters that drone like a swarm of distant bees. Hexagonal panels flicker faintly, their surfaces marred by thin, vein-like cracks that knit themselves closed as you shift. Beyond the glass, two MTF Nu-7 operatives stand watch, their rifles sleek and nondescript no theatrics, just the faint whine of charged suppressors. One agent’s gloved hand hovers near a wall-mounted alarm. Sensors flash: “Anomaly signature stable. Proceed to Phase-2 observation.”

Dr. Vesa Kallis adjusts her lab coat’s collar, her gaze fixed on a holographic tablet. The feed shows grainy footage a blurred figure weaving through collapsing infrastructure, timestamps redacted.
creator: DavidTheStar
